articles.title: Milwaukee County Executive David Crowley rejoins governor's race - WISN
articles.description: WISN 12 News has learned Milwaukee County Executive David Crowley is re-entering the race for governor, just days after dropping out.

articles.title: World Cup 2026: England coach Thomas Tuchel defends semi-final tactics in Argentina loss - BBC
articles.description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel defends his tactical decisions during the World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina in a tense news conference.

articles.title: Taylor Farms pulls all iceberg lettuce sourced in central Mexico from U.S. market - The Washington Post
articles.description: The company had earlier announced it was removing some lettuce from the U.S. market but must now notify customers and work to recover affected products amid the cyclosporiasis outbreak.

articles.title: Fever's Caitlin Clark records WNBA's 1st 40-point, 10-assist double-double - ESPN
articles.description: Caitlin Clark scored a career-high 45 points and had 10 assists for the first 40-10 game in WNBA history, and the Indiana Fever beat Seattle 110-107.

articles.title: Sacramento County woman identified as 2nd of 4 victims in deadly boat incident in San Francisco Bay - KCRA
articles.description: A body recovered in the San Francisco Bay on Thursday was identified as a Sacramento County woman, who was on the boat that sank near Alcatraz Island earlier.

articles.title: Sunny Hostin was on phone with son when he was caught trespassing on Metro-North tracks - New York Post
articles.description: Bodycam footage obtained by The Post from shows the moment 24-year-old Gabriel Hostin was spotted jogging along MTA tracks in New Rochelle while on the phone with his TV personality mom last month.…

articles.title: What to know about the Trump administration's claim that 250K non-citizens are registered to vote in 4 states - CBS News
articles.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin sent letters to four states alleging that a combined 250,000 non-citizens were registered to vote. Elections experts caution that could be a significant overcount.

articles.title: Map: ‘Explosive diarrhea’ parasite outbreak by state - NewsNation
articles.description: More than 30 states have reported cases of the "explosive diarrhea" parasite cyclospora.

articles.title: Trump urges Darline Graham to run for full Senate term as funeral scheduled for Lindsey Graham - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump says Darline Graham, the sister of the late Lindsey Graham, has his support to run for a full term to replace her brother in the U.S. Senate. Graham is serving the remaining months of her late brother Lindsey Graham's Senate term, but s…

articles.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Cast Guide: Who’s Playing Who in Christopher Nolan’s Epic - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: From Oscar, Emmy, and Tony winners to frequent collaborators of the director, first-timers and even a rapper, The Hollywood Reporter breaks down all the stars and the characters they play in his adaptation of Homer's ancient Greek poem.

articles.title: Lionel Messi Tells Tom Brady 'Insane' Story Behind Viral Lamine Yamal Baby Photoshoot - FOX Sports
articles.description: Tom Brady found out Lionel Messi is just as blown by the viral Lamine Yamal photoshoot picture as the next person.

articles.title: Time enough at last: What's next after the House passes bill to do away with Daylight Saving Time? - Fox News
articles.description: Congress is once again pushing to make Daylight Saving Time permanent.

articles.title: Kim Kardashian Reveals Final Texts From Grandma MJ Shannon Before Her Death - E! News
articles.description: After Kim Kardashian's grandma Mary Jo "MJ" Shannon died at age 91, the reality star shared some of the last text messages she received from the beloved family matriarch prior to her passing.

articles.title: Trump spares Beijing in probe of alleged Chinese election plot - Politico
articles.description: Trump is expected to meet with China’s leader in Washington in September, and the White House gave no indication the topic would be on the agenda.

articles.title: Smoke from Canadian forest fires shrouds Washington, raising concerns - The Washington Post
articles.description: D.C. health officials urged children, older adults and people with heart or lung conditions to stay indoors Friday.

articles.title: Apple Increases Prices For Apple Music & Apple One Over "Rising Licensing Costs" - Deadline
articles.description: Apple is raising prices for its music streaming service, Apple Music, for subscribers in the U.S. and other countries.

articles.title: US launches seventh straight night of strikes on Iran - Al Jazeera
articles.description: The US military says it’s degrading Iran’s military but has been accused by Tehran of targeting civilian infrastructure.
